parameters.query:
UPDATE document_sequences
SET last_number = last_number + 1,
    updated_at  = NOW()
WHERE document_type = 'contract'
  AND year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW())::int
RETURNING
  prefix || '-' || year::text || '-' || LPAD(last_number::text, 3, '0') AS document_number;

SELECT
  COALESCE(company_name, full_name, name, '')    AS client_company_name,
  COALESCE(contact_name, full_name, '')          AS client_contact_name,
  COALESCE(street, address_street, '')           AS client_street,
  COALESCE(zip, postal_code, '')                 AS client_zip,
  COALESCE(city, '')                             AS client_city,
  COALESCE(country, 'Deutschland')               AS client_country,
  COALESCE(vat_id, '')                           AS client_vat_id
FROM customers
WHERE id = '{{customer_id}}'::uuid
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO documents (
  document_number,
  document_type,
  title,
  language,
  status,
  customer_id,
  amount_net,
  amount_gross,
  currency,
  file_format,
  mime_type,
  generated_by,
  tags,
  expires_at,
  notes
)
VALUES (
  '{{document_number}}',
  'contract',
  'Dienstleistungsvertrag {{document_number}}',
  '{{language}}',
  'draft',
  '{{customer_id}}'::uuid,
  '{{monthly_fee_num}}'::numeric,
  '{{monthly_fee_num}}'::numeric,
  'EUR',
  'pdf',
  'application/pdf',
  'GENERATE-contract',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'template_key',      'contract_template',
    'proposal_number',   '{{proposal_number}}',
    'start_date',        '{{start_date}}',
    'minimum_term',      '{{minimum_term}}',
    'notice_period',     '{{notice_period}}',
    'services_rows',     '{{services_rows}}',
    'setup_fee',         '{{setup_fee}}',
    'monthly_fee',       '{{monthly_fee}}',
    'client_vat_id',     '{{client_vat_id}}'
  ),
  CASE
    WHEN '{{minimum_term}}' ~ '^d+$'
    THEN '{{start_date}}'::date + ('{{minimum_term}}' || ' months')::interval
    ELSE NULL
  END,
  NULLIF('{{notes}}', '')
)
RETURNING
  id::text        AS document_id,
  document_number,
  status,
  expires_at::date::text AS contract_end_date;

fields.name: next_step
fields.value: POST document_id + variables to PDF renderer → upload to contracts/YEAR/document_number.pdf → UPDATE documents

parameters.noteText: GENERATE-contract — Creates a numbered service contract record REQUIRED INPUTS: customer_id UUID ID from customers table (convert lead first if needed) language TEXT de / en start_date TEXT contract start e.g. "2026-07-01" minimum_term TEXT months as integer e.g. "12" notice_period TEXT e.g. "3" (months) services_rows TEXT HTML rows for services table setup_fee TEXT display value e.g. "1.490,00 €" monthly_fee TEXT display value e.g. "299,00 €" monthly_fee_num NUMBER 299.00 (numeric, for DB) OPTIONAL: proposal_number TEXT linked proposal e.g. "DEE-PRO-2026-001" client_vat_id TEXT override if different from customers table notes TEXT internal notes services_rows FORMAT (HTML): KI-Buchungsassistent Einmalig 1.490,00 € Monatliche Wartung & Support Monatlich 299,00 € OUTPUT: document_number DEE-CON-2026-001 document_id UUID of the documents record contract_end_date start_date + minimum_term months (auto-calculated) status draft AFTER CONTRACT IS SIGNED: UPDATE documents SET status = 'signed', signed_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{document_id}}'::uuid

GENERATE-contract — 4-step pipeline

Step 1 — DB: Assign contract number
  UPDATE document_sequences (atomic)
  → document_number = DEE-CON-2026-001

Step 2 — DB: Get customer details
  SELECT from customers WHERE id = {{customer_id}}
  → client_company_name, client_contact_name,
    address fields, client_vat_id

Step 3 — DB: Create draft document record
  expires_at = start_date + minimum_term months
    (computed with PostgreSQL interval arithmetic)
  tags JSONB stores: proposal_number, start_date,
    minimum_term, notice_period, services, fees
  → document_id, document_number, contract_end_date

Step 4 — SET: Output for PDF renderer
  All variables needed for contract_template HTML render.

── DOCUMENT LIFECYCLE ────────────────────────────────────
  draft    → generated, not yet sent
  sent     → sent to client for review
  signed   → client signed (set signed_at = NOW())
  archived → end of contract term

── LINKS TO OTHER DOCUMENTS ─────────────────────────────
  proposal_number → links back to GENERATE-proposal output
  After signing → run GENERATE-invoice monthly with
    customer_id from this contract

contract_template — all {{variables}} needed

Document info:
  contract_number     DEE-CON-2026-001
  contract_date       08.06.2026
  start_date          01.07.2026
  minimum_term        12  (months)
  notice_period       3   (months)
  proposal_number     DEE-PRO-2026-001 (if linked)

Client info (from customers):
  client_company_name
  client_contact_name
  client_street / client_zip / client_city / client_country
  client_vat_id

Services & financials:
  services_rows       HTML <tr> rows
  setup_fee           "1.490,00 €"
  monthly_fee         "299,00 €"

Storage path after upload:
  storage_key    contracts/2026/DEE-CON-2026-001.pdf
  storage_bucket crowpus-docs-bucket
